nodes.name: REFERENCE.md
nodes.summary: Index/reference page for the vendored 'remotion-captions' agent skill, defining the shared Caption JSON type and pointing to the generating, displaying, and importing caption guides. Third-party reference documentation bundled with the repo's agent tooling, not part of Versus Engine's own architecture.

nodes.name: display-captions.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill guide covering how to display captions in a video: fetching caption data, paginating text, rendering with Sequences, preserving white-space, extracting a dedicated caption component, and word-level highlighting alongside video content. Third-party reference documentation, not Versus Engine's own code.

nodes.name: import-srt-captions.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill guide explaining how to read an .srt subtitle file and convert it into the Caption[] format for use inside a Remotion composition. Third-party reference documentation, not Versus Engine's own code.

nodes.name: transcribe-captions.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill guide describing prerequisites and steps for transcribing audio/video into caption data that can be fed into the captions pipeline. Third-party reference documentation, not Versus Engine's own code.
